mapper.select: SELECT sa.*, s.name AS student_name FROM sys_seat_arrangement sa LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON sa.student_id = s.id WHERE sa.course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT sa.*, s.name AS student_name FROM sys_seat_arrangement sa LEFT JOIN sys_student s ON sa.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_course c ON sa.course_id = c.id WHERE c.class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_seat_arrangement (course_id, student_id, student_name, `row`, `col`, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.courseId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.studentName}, #{item.row}, #{item.col}, NOW(), NOW())
